summary: Frontend-only e2e validation of /about page (16 sections) and regression on 11 marketing routes. All BRD-mandated content, structure, counts, founder-quote uniqueness, anti-'planned' rule, and CTAs verified. Zero console errors across all routes.
critical_code_review_comments: About.jsx is ~1170 lines. While well-organized via section subcomponents, consider splitting each section into its own file under /pages/about/sections/ for maintainability if the page grows further.

Two 'eyebrow' string asserts initially looked like FAILs in the test output ('About Mentor Global', 'Founder Declaration'); root cause is CSS text-transform: uppercase from the .eyebrow class. Underlying data is correct - this is purely a rendered-text vs source-text observation, not a defect.

Belief manifesto section returns 7

elements (1 eyebrow + 6 manifesto lines) which matches BRD's 6 manifesto lines plus a label - correct.
Image of Dr. Ali Rajwani uses customer-assets emergent CDN URL - confirmed loads OK (no broken-image errors).
context_for_next_testing_agent: /about page is fully BRD compliant. 16 sections all render with correct data-testids: about-hero, about-founder-thesis, about-who-we-are, about-what-we-build (5 cards), about-why-infrastructure (5 product + 6 infra items = 11), about-operating-model (4 layers), about-global-presence (5 regions), about-chapters (no 'planned' wording, 5-step expansion timeline rendered both desktop & mobile DOM = 10 elements total), about-backbone, about-philosophy (12 items total = 6+6), about-belief (6 manifesto lines), about-values (7 cards), about-built-by-operators (links to /team), about-differentiators (6 cards), about-future, about-final-cta (3 CTAs to /solutions, /contact, /team). Founder Quote 1 appears exactly once in about-founder-thesis only; Founder Quote 2 appears exactly once in about-future only. All routes (/, /team, /dexa, /subsidiaries, /about, all 5 /solutions/*, /contact) load with 0 console errors.
